response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software engineering with 15+ years across major tech companies (Google, Meta) and leadership roles (Staff Software Engineer, Founder). His background includes AI-agent infrastructure, cloud technologies, and entrepreneurial ventures, aligning well with the Director-level AI strategy role. While his AI-specific product experience is not deeply highlighted, his technical fluency and innovation track record justify strong consideration.
strengths: 15+ years of progressive software engineering experience at top-tier companies (Google, Meta)
Proven expertise in cloud technologies, AI-agent infrastructure, and developer tooling
Entrepreneurial experience with successful open-source platforms and startup-like projects
concerns: Lack of explicit PhD or advanced AI-related academic credentials
Limited direct experience with AI-powered product development at scale in a commercial setting
AI expertise is demonstrated mostly through infrastructure work rather than AI product differentiation

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and innovation track record
Cloud/AI platform and product strategy experience
